title: Add Author Section to README.md
description: Include the author's name and relevant details in the project's README.md file.
details: Edit the README.md file at the project root. Add a clearly labeled 'Author' section near the end or after the project description. Include the author's full name and, if appropriate, contact information or a link to a profile (e.g., GitHub, LinkedIn). Ensure formatting matches the rest of the README and adheres to Markdown best practices.
test_strategy: Review the updated README.md in a Markdown viewer to ensure the author section is present, correctly formatted, and free of typos. Confirm that any links are functional.

title: Add Author Attribution to Landing Page Footer
description: Display the author's name in the footer of the landing page at the '/' route.
details: Edit the global layout component (likely layout.tsx or a Footer component). Add a footer section if not already present, and include a line such as 'Created by [Author Name]'. Ensure the footer is styled consistently with the application's design and is accessible (e.g., proper HTML semantics, ARIA labels if needed).
test_strategy: Run the application locally, navigate to the landing page, and verify that the footer displays the author's name as intended. Check responsiveness and accessibility of the footer.
